text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 and start my day with a glass of water and a light stretch. After a quick shower, I have breakfast—usually oatmeal and fruit. At 8 a.m., I begin my work schedule as a graphic designer, focusing on projects until lunch at noon. In the afternoon, I take a 30-minute walk or do yoga to stay active. After work, I prepare dinner, then relax by reading or watching a show. Before bed, I review my to-do list for the next day. This routine has become my habit, and consistency helps me feel organized and balanced.
